paths:
{{#each delivery_paths}}
  - "{{this}}"
{{/each}}
default_severity: warning

# Delivery Rules
<!-- Generated by Clauding Thought /init -- project-specific delivery checks -->
<!-- Delivery rules catch "code is correct but feature is not delivered" failures. -->
<!-- Examples of what belongs here: -->
<!--   * Route was added but not wired to navigation -->
<!--   * API endpoint exists but its response shape lost a required field -->
<!--   * Cross-module spec has producers without consumers (or vice versa) -->
<!--   * User-facing copy was translated in one locale only -->
<!-- These are project-specific. The plugin bundles none — /init extracts them -->
<!-- from the codebase's actual patterns during Step 3. -->

{{#if delivery_checks}}
{{#each delivery_checks}}
## {{name}}
<!-- severity: {{severity}} -->
{{#if scope}}<!-- scope: {{scope}} -->{{/if}}

{{description}}

{{#if detect}}**Detection:** {{detect}}{{/if}}

{{/each}}
{{else}}
